{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/7993?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chrisvest/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chrisvest/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chrisvest/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chrisvest/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/chrisvest", "id": 7993, "login": "chrisvest", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjc5OTM=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chrisvest/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chrisvest/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chrisvest/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chrisvest/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/chrisvest/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/chrisvest", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47244", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "### Impact
DefaultHttp2Connection.DefaultEndpoint initialises maxActiveStreams/maxStreams to Integer.MAX_VALUE, and Http2Settings never inserts SETTINGS_MAX_CONCURRENT_STREAMS by default (Http2Settings.java:305-307 only clamps a user-supplied value). Unless the application explicitly calls initialSettings().maxConcurrentStreams(n), a Netty HTTP/2 server advertises no limit and enforces none locally. Each open stream allocates a DefaultStream object, PropertyMap slots, flow-controller state and IntObjectHashMap entry; with ~2^30 permissible odd stream IDs a single TCP connection can create hundreds of thousands of long-lived stream objects. This is also the precondition for CVE-2023-44487-style Rapid-Reset amplification, where the absence of a low concurrent cap multiplies backend work.

### Resources
https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc7540.html#section-6.5.2", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00292, "percentile": 0.20647}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-5x3r-wrvg-rp6q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-08T23:02:40Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5x3r-wrvg-rp6q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-5x3r-wrvg-rp6q"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47244"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-12T15:16:29Z", "published_at": "2026-06-08T23:02:40Z", "references": ["https://github.com/netty/netty/security/advisories/GHSA-5x3r-wrvg-rp6q", "https://github.com/netty/netty/releases/tag/netty-4.1.135.Final", "https://github.com/netty/netty/releases/tag/netty-4.2.15.Final", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-47244", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5x3r-wrvg-rp6q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/netty/netty/security-advisories/GHSA-5x3r-wrvg-rp6q", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/netty/netty", "summary": "Netty HTTP/2: Advertised MAX_CONCURRENT_STREAMS are not enforced", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-12T19:30:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-5x3r-wrvg-rp6q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.2.15.Final", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.netty:netty-codec-http2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.2.0.Final, <= 4.2.14.Final"}, {"first_patched_version": "4.1.135.Final", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.netty:netty-codec-http2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 4.1.134.Final"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Netty HTTP/2: Advertised MAX_CONCURRENT_STREAMS are not enforced
